executive_summary: Analysis of 3 papers on on-device AI optimization techniques. Focus areas include quantization, pruning, and model compression with average relevance score of 1/100 and 2 high-impact papers.

takeaways.text: Implement INT8 quantization for 4x speedup on mobile
